entity.summary: Hyperliquid L1 decentralized exchange and V4-style concentrated-liquidity automated-market-maker with current liquidity and active spot trading volume.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Gliquid as a next-generation V4 AMM and CLMM on Hyperliquid L1 and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass, so URL fields remain unset.

evidence.title: Gliquid project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Gliquid metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Gliquid as a V4 AMM and CLMM on Hyperliquid L1 and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Gliquid DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Gliquid as a Hyperliquid L1 decentralized exchange.
